texto: I have been connected with the Niels Bohr Institute since the completion of my university studies, first as a research fellow and, from 1956, as a professor of physics at the University of Copenhagen. After the death of my father in 1962, I followed him as director of the Institute until 1970.
explicacao: Citação de Aage Bohr sobre temas ligados a familia. “I have been connected with the Niels Bohr Institute since the completion of my university studies…” articula familia, father, research em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como luto e research.
